title: What Should An AI Device Look Like? — With Alex Himel
summary: Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, discusses why smart glasses represent the next major computing platform for AI assistants. The conversation covers AI applications in daily tasks, privacy concerns around facial recognition, on-device AI, and Meta's competitive position against OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon in the AI device space.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz interviews Alex Himel, Meta's VP of Wearables, who argues that smart glasses are positioned to become the next major computing platform for AI assistants. The discussion covers how AI handles daily tasks, the privacy questions raised by facial recognition, and the role of on-device AI in wearables. Himel also frames Meta's competitive standing against OpenAI, Google, Apple, and Amazon in the AI device market.
